channel.title: Meta on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Meta Smart Glasses Launch
item.description: Meta launches smart glasses with improved design and affordability

item.title: Meta Smart Glasses Charger
item.description: Meta launched a charging stand for smart glasses, priced at $59, compatible with several models

item.title: Meta Debuts New Smart Glasses
item.description: Meta launches new smart glasses with camera and speakers, starting at $299

item.title: Meta Bets Big on India: WhatsApp’s New Chief & $900M CRED Deal
item.description: Meta appoints Kunal Shah as WhatsApp’s new chief and invests $900M in CRED, signaling a strategic push into India’s fintech and messaging markets.

item.title: Face Recognition Tech Sparks Concern
item.description: Explore the latest on face recognition tech, its uses, and the concerns surrounding it, including Meta's testing of military-built software
